_meta.title: Catbotica Zodiac Badge — PuLID FLUX Workflow
_meta.description: Catbotica zodiac badges: hard-surface mechanical, enamel pin, hybrid palette (Cyan/Red/Gold/Black). Horse master, then PuLID from Horse. Bible: project_bible.md + LS-CATBOTICA-ANCHOR-012.
_meta.author: Lore Sanctum / BeyondVerse Studio
usage_notes: STEP 1: Set node 6 to Horse badge (Catbotica mechanical, enamel pin) from zodiac_badge_prompts.md
STEP 2: Run WITHOUT PuLID to generate Master Badge (Horse)
STEP 4: Add PuLID back, load master_badge_horse.png in node 15 (LoadImage)
STEP 5: Swap the positive prompt to each zodiac in turn, generate all 11 remaining badges
STEP 6: For transparent background variants, add an alpha-matting/bg-removal node after node 8 (VAEDecode)
NOTE: FLUX uses CLIPTextEncodeFlux (dual clip_l + t5xxl) and cfg=1.0 with internal guidance=3.5

inputs.clip_l: Minimal abstract dog badge, rounded-edge box frame, standard dog silhouette, subtle glimmer, black background
inputs.t5xxl: Abstract minimal zodiac badge. Standard DOG silhouette, simple and recognizable: sitting or standing pose, clean outline, medium build, neutral friendly shape. Hard-surface mechanical style only. Rounded-edge box or rounded rectangle frame; subject fully inside, nothing outside the boundary. Flat metallic panels, one thin Electric Cyan #00F2FF circuit line. Simple thin Cyan rounded border, one subtle Gold #FFD700 or Imperial Red #C41E3A accent. Very subtle soft glimmer or faint Luck-Module at forehead, no strong glow. Carbon Fiber Black #0D0D0D background. Clean, minimal, geometric, centered, symmetrical, no ornamentation, no details above or outside the frame, digital collectible.

_meta.title: Positive Prompt (FLUX Dual Encoder) — SWAP PER ZODIAC

inputs.t5xxl: fur, hair, feathers, organic skin, organic eyes, realistic animal, photograph, soft textures, watercolor, oil painting, blurry, low quality, text, typography, words, letters, numbers, human face, human body, environmental background, landscape, scenery, multiple objects, cluttered, asymmetrical, cartoon, chibi, anime, sketch, pencil drawing, crayon, ornate, baroque, filigree, busy, decorative, intricate patterns, heraldic, crest, shield, excessive detail, lavish, fancy, details at top, ornament above frame, elements outside boundary, strong glow, harsh glimmer, bright spotlight

_meta.title: Negative Prompt (FLUX Dual Encoder) — DO NOT CHANGE
KSampler (28 steps, CFG 1.0 — FLUX uses internal guidance)
Save Image — UPDATE filename_prefix per zodiac
Apply PuLID FLUX — Max style lock (weight 1.0, end_at 1.0)
